label: Subheadline
hint: One or two short sentences under the big title.
src: Over 54 years of combined experience. The first conversation is free.
default: Over 54 years of combined experience. The first conversation is free.

label: Emergency link
hint: The italic line that leads to The First 24 Hours.
src: If someone was arrested tonight, start here.
default: If someone was arrested tonight, start here.

label: First 24 Hours: title
src: The First 24 Hours
default: The First 24 Hours

label: Practice areas: title
src: What we handle.
default: What we handle.

label: Testimonials: title
src: What clients say when it is over.
default: What clients say when it is over.

label: Questions: title
src: Questions we hear at the first meeting.
default: Questions we hear at the first meeting.

label: Intro line
src: What to do right now, in plain words. Written for Central Louisiana families by the lawyers who take these calls.
default: What to do right now, in plain words. Written for Central Louisiana families by the lawyers who take these calls.

label: Intro line
src: Criminal defense, estate planning, personal injury, and juvenile law. One firm for the whole of it, handled by the two attorneys whose name is on the door. Open a row to see the work.
default: Criminal defense, estate planning, personal injury, and juvenile law. One firm for the whole of it, handled by the two attorneys whose name is on the door. Open a row to see the work.

label: Intro line
src: Plain answers, the same ones we give across the table.
default: Plain answers, the same ones we give across the table.

label: Intro paragraph
src: Every case here begins the same way: you tell us what is going on, and we listen. The consultation is free, in person or by video.
default: Every case here begins the same way: you tell us what is going on, and we listen. The consultation is free, in person or by video.

label: Step 1 title
src: Say one sentence, out loud
default: Say one sentence, out loud

label: Step 2 title
src: Do not sign, consent, or explain
default: Do not sign, consent, or explain

label: Step 2 text
src: No written statements. No waivers. No consent to search a car, a phone, or a home. Saying no is not an admission of anything. It is the law working the way it is supposed to.
default: No written statements. No waivers. No consent to search a car, a phone, or a home. Saying no is not an admission of anything. It is the law working the way it is supposed to.

label: Step 3 title
src: Treat every jail phone as a recorded line
default: Treat every jail phone as a recorded line

label: Step 3 text
src: Because it is. Talk about family, money for the account, and staying steady. Never discuss the case, the charges, or that night on a jail phone.
default: Because it is. Talk about family, money for the account, and staying steady. Never discuss the case, the charges, or that night on a jail phone.

label: Step 4 title
src: Write everything down tonight
default: Write everything down tonight

label: Step 4 text
src: The time and place of the arrest. The names you heard. Who was there. What was taken. Memory fades in a day. Paper does not.
default: The time and place of the arrest. The names you heard. Who was there. What was taken. Memory fades in a day. Paper does not.

label: Step 5 title
src: Call before anyone decides anything
default: Call before anyone decides anything

label: Say-card title
src: What to say. What not to say.
default: What to say. What not to say.

label: Say-card closing line
src: Silence protects you only after you claim it. Claim it, then keep it.
default: Silence protects you only after you claim it. Claim it, then keep it.

label: Intro paragraph
src: Higgins Law is a father and a son. George Lewis Higgins III has tried cases for over forty years. His son Alex practices beside him and manages the firm. The office is on Melrose Street in Pineville. When you call, you reach the people who will actually handle your case. You will never be just a file here.
default: Higgins Law is a father and a son. George Lewis Higgins III has tried cases for over forty years. His son Alex practices beside him and manages the firm. The office is on Melrose Street in Pineville. When you call, you reach the people who will actually handle your case. You will never be just a file here.

label: George's bio
src: George Lewis Higgins III has practiced law for over forty years. He built the firm on preparation and a steady presence in the courtroom, and he built its reputation the slow way: one client, one case at a time.
default: George Lewis Higgins III has practiced law for over forty years. He built the firm on preparation and a steady presence in the courtroom, and he built its reputation the slow way: one client, one case at a time.

label: Alex's bio
src: G. Alexander Higgins is the second generation of the firm and its managing partner. He grew up around this work, and he holds his cases to the standard his father set. Clients stay informed at every step, because that is how he was taught to practice.
default: G. Alexander Higgins is the second generation of the firm and its managing partner. He grew up around this work, and he holds his cases to the standard his father set. Clients stay informed at every step, because that is how he was taught to practice.

label: Criminal Defense: one-liner
hint: The italic line on the closed row.
src: A charge is not a conviction. We stand with the person behind the accusation.
default: A charge is not a conviction. We stand with the person behind the accusation.

label: Estate Planning: one-liner
hint: The italic line on the closed row.
src: A will, a power of attorney, a plan. Plain documents at a plain price, so your family is never left guessing.
default: A will, a power of attorney, a plan. Plain documents at a plain price, so your family is never left guessing.

label: Personal Injury: one-liner
hint: The italic line on the closed row.
src: Hurt because someone else was careless? Louisiana gives you less time than you think.
default: Hurt because someone else was careless? Louisiana gives you less time than you think.

label: Juvenile Law: one-liner
hint: The italic line on the closed row.
src: The family is the fundamental unit of society. When yours is under strain, we stand with all of it.
default: The family is the fundamental unit of society. When yours is under strain, we stand with all of it.

label: Point 1 title
src: You Will Know Where You Stand
default: You Will Know Where You Stand

label: Point 1 text
src: You will understand the process, know your options, and never be left in the dark.
default: You will understand the process, know your options, and never be left in the dark.

label: Point 2 title
src: The State Has the Burden
default: The State Has the Burden

label: Point 2 text
src: We examine the evidence, hold the State to its burden, and tell your side of the story.
default: We examine the evidence, hold the State to its burden, and tell your side of the story.

label: Point 3 title
src: Ready for the Courtroom
default: Ready for the Courtroom

label: Point 3 text
src: Decades of courtroom advocacy, prepared for the moment a case needs to be tried.
default: Decades of courtroom advocacy, prepared for the moment a case needs to be tried.

label: Point 4 title
src: Expungements
default: Expungements

label: Point 4 text
src: Clearing a record is something we handle regularly. Ask about your eligibility.
default: Clearing a record is something we handle regularly. Ask about your eligibility.

label: Point 1 title
src: The Family Comes First
default: The Family Comes First

label: Point 1 text
src: Families are the fabric a community is woven from. Our job, in every juvenile matter, is to help hold yours together.
default: Families are the fabric a community is woven from. Our job, in every juvenile matter, is to help hold yours together.

label: Point 2 title
src: Delinquency Defense
default: Delinquency Defense

label: Point 2 text
src: Protecting minors with the emphasis on rehabilitation, not punishment. A mistake at fifteen should not define a life.
default: Protecting minors with the emphasis on rehabilitation, not punishment. A mistake at fifteen should not define a life.

label: Point 3 title
src: Custody & DCFS
default: Custody & DCFS

label: Point 3 text
src: Standing with parents when DCFS threatens parental rights. These cases move on strict timelines.
default: Standing with parents when DCFS threatens parental rights. These cases move on strict timelines.

label: Point 4 title
src: Keeping Kids in Juvenile Court
default: Keeping Kids in Juvenile Court

label: Point 4 text
src: Fighting to keep juveniles in the juvenile system, where the focus is their future.
default: Fighting to keep juveniles in the juvenile system, where the focus is their future.

label: Point 5 title
src: What Comes After
default: What Comes After

label: Point 5 text
src: Court is not the end of it. We help families find their footing, and we stay reachable when questions come.
default: Court is not the end of it. We help families find their footing, and we stay reachable when questions come.

label: Point 1 title
src: Your Story, Heard First
default: Your Story, Heard First

label: Point 1 text
src: Our advocacy reflects the full reality of what the injury took from your days.
default: Our advocacy reflects the full reality of what the injury took from your days.

label: Point 2 title
src: Built Like a Trial Case
default: Built Like a Trial Case

label: Point 2 text
src: Medical records, expert testimony, deliberate preparation. Ready for a courtroom from day one.
default: Medical records, expert testimony, deliberate preparation. Ready for a courtroom from day one.

label: Point 3 title
src: Negotiating from Strength
default: Negotiating from Strength

label: Point 3 text
src: A trial reputation is leverage at the settlement table.
default: A trial reputation is leverage at the settlement table.

label: Point 4 title
src: The Full Cost, Counted
default: The Full Cost, Counted

label: Point 4 text
src: Medical bills, lost wages, and what the injury took from your life. We account for all of it. Injury cases are handled on contingency.
default: Medical bills, lost wages, and what the injury took from your life. We account for all of it. Injury cases are handled on contingency.

label: Point 1 title
src: Wills & Trusts
default: Wills & Trusts

label: Point 1 text
src: From simple wills to comprehensive trusts: safeguard assets, reduce conflict, and protect your family.
default: From simple wills to comprehensive trusts: safeguard assets, reduce conflict, and protect your family.

label: Point 2 title
src: Powers of Attorney & Health Directives
default: Powers of Attorney & Health Directives

label: Point 2 text
src: Clear documents, so your medical, financial, and legal decisions rest with the people you trust most.
default: Clear documents, so your medical, financial, and legal decisions rest with the people you trust most.

label: Point 3 title
src: Successions & Probate
default: Successions & Probate

label: Point 3 text
src: When a loved one passes, we guide families through the process with clarity and compassion.
default: When a loved one passes, we guide families through the process with clarity and compassion.

label: Steps heading
src: What happens when you call
default: What happens when you call

label: Steps subtitle
src: Three steps. No mystery.
default: Three steps. No mystery.

label: Step 1 title
src: You Call
default: You Call

label: Step 1 text
src: Call, or send the form. We listen, answer your questions, and explain your options. The consultation is free, with no obligation.
default: Call, or send the form. We listen, answer your questions, and explain your options. The consultation is free, with no obligation.

label: Step 2 title
src: We Prepare
default: We Prepare

label: Step 2 text
src: We build the strategy, gather the evidence, and bring in experts when the case needs them.
default: We build the strategy, gather the evidence, and bring in experts when the case needs them.

label: Step 3 title
src: You Decide
default: You Decide

label: Step 3 text
src: Settle or go to trial: we lay out the choices plainly and prepare for both. The decision is yours, made with full information.
default: Settle or go to trial: we lay out the choices plainly and prepare for both. The decision is yours, made with full information.

label: Form title
src: Request a Free Consultation
default: Request a Free Consultation

label: Form subtitle
src: No fee. No obligation. Just answers.
default: No fee. No obligation. Just answers.
